risk: Creating tables before field design is stable
mitigation: complete gap review and design review before migration

risk: Inconsistent lab units create unsafe interpretation
mitigation: define unit field and normalization plan

risk: Missing reference ranges reduce abnormal flag safety
AI abnormal summary could be mistaken as final diagnosis
mitigation: require AI draft status and clinician review

risk: Diagnostic report text may contain PHI
mitigation: avoid PHI in repo evidence and add redaction policy

risk: External report URLs could expose secrets or expire
mitigation: use safe attachment_ref not secret URLs

risk: Lab/device/DICOM real ingest before dry-run safety review
mitigation: keep real ingest out of scope
scope through Case ownership and tests

risk: Final reports may later be amended
